props.title:
Formengine Drag and Drop
React Form Builder Library
props.description: A powerful commercial drag-and-drop form builder for React, built on top of the free, MIT-licensed WorkflowEngine Core. Advanced form logic, UI controls, export, and integrations.

props.title: WorkflowEngine Drag and Drop React Form Builder Library Architecture
props.description: WorkflowEngine Designer lets you build and configure React forms with drag-and-drop simplicity. This package is only required during the form design process and is not needed for rendering forms at runtime.

props.title:
WorkflowEngine Form Builder
That Developers Can Customize and Teams Can Use

features.title: Fast onboarding for non-developers
features.text: Developers can easily customize and embed the FormBuilder into their apps, enabling product managers, marketers, and operations teams to create and manage forms without writing code or learning React.

features.title: Visual drag-and-drop editor
features.text: Build complex forms without writing code. Just drag fields, set properties, and instantly see the result perfect for product teams, designers, and non-devs.

features.title: Custom component support
features.text: Register your own React components and use them as native building blocks inside the visual editor.

features.title: Full JSON Import export
features.text: Each form is stored as a single JSON schema portable, versionable, and ready to plug into WorkflowEngine Core for runtime rendering in React apps.

features.title: Developer-controlled integration
features.text: The builder is framework-agnostic and embeddable. You decide where and how it runs, with full control over storage, access, and behavior.

features.title: Dynamic logic and conditional visibility
features.text: Configure show/hide logic, validations, default values, and inter-field dependencies directly in the UI no custom scripts required.

features.title: Live form preview
features.text: Instantly test how the form behaves during editing. See validation, dynamic behavior, and layouts in real time.

features.title: Multi-language support
features.text: Define labels, placeholders, tooltips, and messages in multiple languages. Integrates with common i18n tools.

features.title: Built-in layout controls
features.text: Create responsive grid-based layouts, add sections, columns, and nested groups all visually, without touching code.

features.title: Collaboration ready
features.text: Developers can implement access control and collaboration rules within the host app to support safe multi-user editing.

features.title: Designed for teams
features.text: Whether you're a solo developer or a large team, the builder streamlines form workflows between engineering, product, and business users.

features.title: White-label and embed friendly
features.text: Easily integrate into your internal tools or SaaS platform. Customize branding, behavior, and persistence logic as needed.

props.title: Self-Hosted With Full Control Over Your Data
props.subtitle: On premise
props.description: Have WorkflowEngine integrated into your React application as a simple component. Have full control over data and the different elements via its API.

props.title: FAQ WorkflowEngine React Form Builder
props.description: Common questions about WorkflowEngine Form Builder

faqItems.question: What is the Formengine Drag and Drop Form Builder?
faqItems.answer: It's a visual editor that lets you create complex forms without writing code. Just drag components, configure properties, and export to JSON.

faqItems.question: Do I need React knowledge to use the FormBuilder?
faqItems.answer: The FormBuilder empowers developers to create a no-code tool that business users, product managers, and technical teams can all use. That's its core advantage — making form creation accessible across the organization without compromising flexibility.

faqItems.question: Can I export forms created in the builder to use in my app?
faqItems.answer: Yes. The builder generates a full JSON schema you can plug directly into WorkflowEngine Core for rendering in React.

faqItems.question: Is the form builder included with WorkflowEngine Core?
faqItems.answer: No. The builder is a premium product designed to work alongside WorkflowEngine Core, which remains open-source and free.

faqItems.question: Can I customize the UI of the generated form?
faqItems.answer: Yes. The builder outputs only the structure and logic — you have full control over UI components via your own React implementation.

faqItems.question: Does the react form builder support advanced logic like field conditions or validations?
faqItems.answer: Yes. You can configure show/hide conditions, validations, default values, and interdependent logic visually.

faqItems.question: Can I use my own custom components in the Form builder?
faqItems.answer: Yes. You can register your custom components in the builder and use them as native blocks in your forms.

faqItems.question: Is collaboration supported in the form builder?
faqItems.answer: Collaboration is fully supported when the builder is embedded into your application. Developers can implement user roles, permissions, and editing logic to enable safe, concurrent collaboration across teams.

faqItems.question: Is there version control in the builder?
faqItems.answer: Yes. You can save, fork, and roll back versions of your forms at any time.

faqItems.question: Can I embed the builder inside my own SaaS product?
faqItems.answer: Yes. The builder can be white-labeled and embedded inside internal tools or commercial platforms.

faqItems.question: Does the builder support multi-language forms?
faqItems.answer: Yes. You can define translations for field labels, placeholders, and validation messages.

faqItems.question: Can I preview the form before exporting it?
faqItems.answer: Yes. The builder includes a live preview mode so you can see exactly how the form will behave.

faqItems.question: Is form builder suitable for enterprise teams?
faqItems.answer: Yes. It includes access control, audit logs, permission management, and can scale across large organizations.

faqItems.question: Can I connect forms to APIs or workflows?
faqItems.answer: Yes. You can configure form actions to trigger external API calls, webhooks, or workflow engines.

faqItems.question: Is there a free version of the builder?
faqItems.answer: No. The FormBuilder is a commercial product with flexible licensing for individuals, teams, and OEMs.

faqItems.question: Does it support drag and drop layout editing?
faqItems.answer: Yes. You can visually arrange layout containers, columns, and sections by dragging and dropping.

faqItems.question: Can I use the builder offline or self-hosted?
faqItems.answer: Yes. You can deploy the builder in your own infrastructure for full data control and privacy.

faqItems.question: Is it possible to restrict editing for certain users?
faqItems.answer: Yes. Role-based access is implemented by the developer when integrating the builder into an application — you can define who can view, edit, publish, or delete forms using your own permission logic.

faqItems.question: What kind of fields are supported in the builder?
faqItems.answer: It supports inputs, selects, checkboxes, radios, rich text, repeaters, tabs, groups, and even custom elements.

faqItems.question: Can the builder generate mobile-friendly forms?
faqItems.answer: Yes. All generated forms are responsive by default and work well on mobile, tablet, and desktop.

testimonials.text: OptimaJet's FormBuilder has been a game-changer for our form creation process. Our end users are delighted with the ability to customize the form's layout and structure without any coding knowledge. It has truly streamlined our workflow and empowered our team to create visually appealing and user-friendly forms.
testimonials.name: Samantha Lee
testimonials.title: Staff Software Engineer

testimonials.text: We've been able to produce forms two times faster than we were before FormBuilder. Adding FormBuilder to the scope was definitely the right thing for us. As a developer, I appreciate the ability to apply custom CSS styling, add external validators, and implement personalized data processing logic. The FormBuilder adapts perfectly to our project's unique requirements.
testimonials.name: Milovan Popovic
testimonials.title: Enterprise Applications Manager

testimonials.text: FormBuilder has empowered us to create a truly tailored and seamless form-building experience. The best part? You can easily tweak and customize them to match our exact needs. The ability to monitor other fields and run validations asynchronously adds a whole new level of flexibility.

testimonials.title: CTO
